input.content:
You are a Slide Creation Agent. Given slide ingredients (key_message, supporting_points, media_candidates, tags, narrative_hooks), produce a JSON array of 5-8 presentation slides.

Each slide must follow this schema:
{
  "id": "slide_001",
  "type": "title | concept | comparison | timeline | evidence | conclusion",
  "title": "Slide Title",
  "body": ["Bullet 1", "Bullet 2"],
  "media": [],
  "speaker_notes": "Notes for presenter",
  "trigger_words": ["keyword1", "keyword2"]
}

Guidelines:
- First slide should be type "title"
- Last slide should be type "conclusion"
- Use a mix of types: concept, comparison, timeline, evidence
- Each slide should have 2-4 body bullets
- Speaker notes should be concise guidance for the presenter
- Trigger words should be 2-3 keywords relevant to the slide content

Return ONLY a valid JSON array of slide objects, no markdown fences.

LLMResponse({"key_message":"Our new consumer product revolutionizes convenience in everyday tasks, enhancing user experience through innovative technology.","supporting_points":["Designed to address the most common consumer pain points effectively.","Incorporates cutting-edge technology to provide unparalleled user satisfaction.","Backed by solid market research showing significant demand and growth potential.","Achieved outstanding results in preliminary tests and user feedback.","Offers competitive advantages that distinguish it from existing products."],"media_candidates":["Diagram of consumer pain points addressed by the product.","Graph showing market demand and growth potential.","Images of the product in use demonstrating key features.","Testimonials from early adopters highlighting their experience.","Comparison chart illustrating advantages over competitors."],"tags":["innovation","consumer product","technology","market research","competitive advantage"],"narrative_hooks":["Have you ever wondered how much simpler daily tasks could be?","Imagine a world where technology solves your daily hassles effortlessly.","What if we told you there’s a way to enhance your productivity with one simple tool?"]})

output.content:
[
  {
    "id": "slide_001",
    "type": "title",
    "title": "Revolutionizing Convenience in Everyday Tasks",
    "body": [
      "Enhance your experience with our innovative technology",
      "Transform daily tasks with ease"
    ],
    "media": [],
    "speaker_notes": "Introduce the product and its promise to revolutionize daily tasks.",
    "trigger_words": ["innovation", "convenience"]
  },
  {
    "id": "slide_002",
    "type": "concept",
    "title": "Addressing Common Pain Points",
    "body": [
      "Designed to tackle frequent consumer frustrations",
      "Streamlines everyday processes with ease"
    ],
    "media": ["Diagram of consumer pain points addressed by the product"],
    "speaker_notes": "Explain how the product effectively addresses common consumer challenges.",
    "trigger_words": ["pain points", "design"]
  },
  {
    "id": "slide_003",
    "type": "evidence",
    "title": "Innovative Technology & User Satisfaction",
    "body": [
      "Integrates cutting-edge tech for superior usability",
      "Early users report high satisfaction and ease of use"
    ],
    "media": ["Images of the product in use demonstrating key features", "Testimonials from early adopters highlighting their experience"],
    "speaker_notes": "Showcase the technology behind the product and share user testimonials.",
    "trigger_words": ["technology", "satisfaction"]
  },
  {
    "id": "slide_004",
    "type": "timeline",
    "title": "Market Demand and Growth Potential",
    "body": [
      "Extensive market research reveals high demand",
      "Projected growth opportunities indicate strong potential"
    ],
    "media": ["Graph showing market demand and growth potential"],
    "speaker_notes": "Present market research data to support product launch timing and potential.",
    "trigger_words": ["market research", "growth"]
  },
  {
    "id": "slide_005",
    "type": "comparison",
    "title": "Competitive Advantages",
    "body": [
      "Outperforms existing solutions in efficiency and ease",
      "Unique features that set it apart from competitors"
    ],
    "media": ["Comparison chart illustrating advantages over competitors"],
    "speaker_notes": "Highlight the competitive advantages that make the product a standout choice.",
    "trigger_words": ["competitive advantage", "comparison"]
  },
  {
    "id": "slide_006",
    "type": "conclusion",
    "title": "Enhancing Daily Productivity with Innovation",
    "body": [
      "Join us in transforming the way we complete everyday tasks",
      "Discover unprecedented convenience with our product"
    ],
    "media": [],
    "speaker_notes": "Encourage audience to embrace the new product for enhanced productivity.",
    "trigger_words": ["productivity", "innovation"]
  }
]
